    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "2, ['Requesting or confirming the user’s current healthcare provider/clinic/network information for continuity-of-care validation', 'Offering or performing a “Neighborhood Suitability and Health Access Review” that evaluates proximity to the user’s existing healthcare providers (a livability/medical continuity service not covered by any defined template field)']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "6, ['Providing multiple mortgage/financing options with down payment, interest rate, term, and fees (maps to financing_options)', 'Listing legal service packages with costs, included features, and service levels (maps to service_packages/service_type=legal)', 'Offering moving service options with levels, costs, and included features (maps to moving_services)', 'Providing optional premium moving upgrade with unpacking and insurance (maps to moving_services.special_requirements_supported and service_packages.included_features)', 'Listing utility setup packages with setup cost, monthly cost, and services included (maps to utility_services)', 'Requesting confirmation to include optional add-on step in a service package (maps to contact_coordination.next_action_required or confirmation_tracking fields)']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
